ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2
Language: python
The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SolaceLabs/solace-agent-mesh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SolaceLabs/solace-agent-mesh
Language: python
An event-driven framework designed to build and orchestrate multi-agent AI systems. It enables seamless integration of AI agents with real-world data sources and systems, facilitating complex, multi-step workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析器：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
+192 Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
